I've spent 41 actions and still haven't solved level 1. I need to completely rethink this puzzle from scratch.
Let me look at all the transitions in history to understand what changes have happened. The only thing that changes gameplay objects is clicking on the blue blocks. Everything else only changes the timer.

Actually, let me think about this differently. Maybe the goal is to have the charcoal+yellow pair at a specific position when the timer reaches a specific value. But I don't know what that position or value is.
Let me try a completely different approach. Let me look at the segmentation to understand the object structure better.
Actually, let me try something I haven't tried: clicking on the charcoal shape at the original position, but on the wide part's top-left corner. The wide part is at cols 46-49. The top-left corner is at row 46, col 46. I already tried this. Let me try clicking on the wide part's bottom-left corner. The bottom-left corner is at row 47, col 46. I already tried this.
OK, I've tried clicking on many parts of the charcoal shape at both original and shifted positions. None of them worked.
Let me try a completely different hypothesis. Maybe the goal is to click on the yellow bar. The yellow bar is at cols 50-51. Let me click on row 47, col 50 (left part of yellow bar at original position).
Wait, I already tried clicking on the yellow bar (row 47, col 50) and it had no effect.
OK, I'm really stuck. Let me try one more thing: maybe the goal is to click on the charcoal shape when it's at the original position, and the click needs to be on the wide part's center. The wide part is at cols 46-49. The center is at col 47-48. Let me click on row 46, col 47 (top-center of wide part at original position).
